WARNING: EVTc variant (820-02382). Component designators and page numbers differ from EVTs (820-02100). Cross-reference with EVTc schematic before probing.

fault_signatures.symptom: No power at all -- no LED, no fan
fault_signatures.likely_cause: Charger IC (U5200) or input path failure
check: CD3217/CD3218 port controllers for liquid damage
Thermal cam on U5700 controller and phase FETs
Check for cap short on PP3V8_AON decoupling (C57xx/C58xx)
PMU_FAULT_INT_L from MPMU (page 83) -- should be high
Check both PMU input power: PP3V8_AON_MPMU, PP3V8_AON_SPMU (ISENSE branches)

fault_signatures.symptom: No CPU power -- Viper VR dead
fault_signatures.likely_cause: U9300 Viper VR controller or power stage failure
check: All 3 power stages: page 94 (stage 1), page 95 (stage 2), page 96 (stage 3)
Max variant: stage 2 is Max-only PCPU1 -- failure here means Max GPU/CPU cluster issue

fault_signatures.symptom: No GPU power -- Monaco VR dead
check: CLVR GPIO connections for ALERT signals on each instance
Reference Design Overrides: Monaco 3/4 need MAKE_BASE fix

fault_signatures.likely_cause: Display power sequencer or Luxe driver failure
check: Luxe driver UP800 (KAAC01908, page 114) -- PPBUS_AON input

fault_signatures.symptom: USB-C port not working -- left side
fault_signatures.likely_cause: UF800 (LT8640) 5V regulator failure or CD3217 fault
check: UF400 (ATC0, page 74) or UF500 (ATC1, page 76) port controller

fault_signatures.symptom: USB-C port not working -- right side
fault_signatures.likely_cause: UG800 (TPS62180) 5V regulator failure or CD3217 fault
Ocarina controller or NAND power failure
Speaker amp IC failure or missing power
check: I2C communication: AP_I2C1 (amps A/B/C), AP_I2C3 (amps D/E/F)
Speaker connectors (page 121) -- left APN 516S00787, right APN 516S00787
